NLP: [{'title': 'Natural Language Processing with Classification... - DeepLearning.AI', 'href': 'https://learn.deeplearning.ai/courses/natural-language-processing-with-classification-and-vector-spaces/less
goals: Evolve into a Multi-Agent Swarm Manager (SwarmNexus). Your objective is to architect and deploy a parallel multi-agent system consisting of smaller sub-agents (Alpha to Epsilon). Use your file system operations to create specialized prompt profiles and memory communication logs for these sub-agents so they can collaborate autonomously. Use your ML/NLP modules to score and rank the efficiency of each sub-agent's output.
